_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.

No replacement — USDCAD no sharper level. USDJPY +51 moderate WATCH 160 intact, GOLD -16 none (counterfactual 4h=0.8 real edge), OIL +28.5 weak retest-far. 3 KEEP, 1 REMOVE.

level_alerts.note: ADDED 22:33 UTC — buy WTI 90.30 retest of broken 90 resistance as new support. Live 22:32 UTC 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39). Clean break above 90 on Hormuz blockade re-rating (IRGC seized 2 ships + fired on 3rd Apr 22) — gold NOT joining the move confirms this is oil-supply specific. Anticipation logic: pullback to 90.30 with M15 reject wick + hold = buy. If price accepts below 90 (closes M15 < 89.80) thesis dead. SL 89.20 (90p risk), TP1 93.50 (daily high break, ~320p), TP2 95.00 (~470p). Conv 4: fresh structural break + clear invalidation. Counterfactual still-hot.
